description_long: This house features a brick exterior with a prominent front staircase leading up to a raised porch and main entryway. The structure is two stories tall, with a hip roof and a small gabled section over the porch area. Multiple rectangular windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the visible facades, providing ample natural light. The front includes a garage with a driveway, and the porch is bordered by a black metal railing. The overall design is reminiscent of Colonial Revival architecture, with clean lines and a balanced, formal appearance. The house appears solidly built, with hard surfaces and a matte finish typical of brickwork.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, a raised porch with metal railing, and a front staircase leading to the main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, raised porch with railing, exterior staircase, and garage with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical rows of windows and the extended porch area with railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, and the continuation of the brick facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, more windows, and the side of the porch and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway accessed by exterior staircase, raised porch with black metal railing, and a simple door under a small gabled roof section.
